label: Full Stack .NET Developer / Database Administrator at NWMLS
headline: .NET Developer / Database Administrator — C#, ASP.NET, T-SQL, SQL Server DBA, Real Estate Tech (RETS)

solid-earth.title: Application Developer / Architect (MLS Specialist)
description: Architected and maintained RETS (Real Estate Transaction Standard) client and server software on Oracle and C#, delivering one of the fastest compliant servers for real estate boards.
Built and optimized configurable ASP.NET MLS frontends driven by XML to support diverse business rules and member board branding.
Engineered a market analytics and statistics module surfacing deep MLS metrics and real estate board reporting for brokers and administrators.
Coordinated with MLS stakeholders to ensure high uptime, data freshness, and protocol compliance across broker and board integrations.

storable.title: Software Engineer II (.NET & SQL Server)
description: Developed and maintained .NET Core services and web applications utilizing SQL Server and PostgreSQL to drive insurance and tenant workflows.
Managed database performance and stability using Entity Framework and Hangfire for background job scheduling and data synchronization.
Monitored and conduct performance tuning for backend systems to ensure data eligibility and billing accuracy across desktop and web products.
Collaborated on domain-driven design and established unit-testing patterns to improve system reliability and maintainability.

iadvantage.title: Lead Developer / Database Source Control
description: Led delivery of complex, data-driven lab platforms across WebForms, MVC, and WebAPI with user-defined relational data models.
Guided database source control and deployment methods using Azure DevOps for builds, migrations, and environment management.
Implemented custom reporting pipelines and RESTful OData/SOAP endpoints to preserve data lineage and audit trails.
Mentored the development team through code reviews and design reviews to ensure adherence to established coding policies and security standards.
Delivered full stack Microsoft-stack projects for multiple clients, specializing in WinForms, ASP.NET, and SQL Server backend development.
Planned and tracked sprints and technical risks while mentoring junior developers on coding standards and SQL performance habits.
Conducted production readiness checks and performance tuning for SQL Server databases across diverse client engagements.
Led the modernization of legacy accounting systems into a cohesive .NET WinForms application with integrated SQL Server reporting.
Designed and implemented role-based security and custom bug reporting systems to streamline the software development life cycle.
Utilized Agile methodologies to deliver modernization milestones early while maintaining data integrity across inventory and equipment modules.
